programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in High Wycombe where Carly and Phil are at deadlock over their four-bed semi. Eight years after buying their once roomy home, life is somewhat different with three young daughters.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil help two sets of buyers come to terms with the competitive property scene in Nottingham, where trendy homes in the right spot are scarce.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce and Veronica are separating dreams from reality with two buyers with grand plans. They're looking for a palatial pile in the beautiful NSW Southern Highlands for Peter and Grace, but finding the perfect property can prove a little testing. They're also on the hunt on the NSW South Coast for Kerry and Wayne. They've got champagne tastes on a beer budget and it's Veronica's job to convince them you get what you pay for.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: People sell houses for many reasons. Shawnah and Frank, they're selling up to have a baby. The only way this couple can add to their family is through IVF, but without the money from a sale of their Mudgee investment property, their plans are on hold. The house, a pint-size ex milk bar, is the cheapest house in Mudgee. It's on the market for just $180,000 but still nobody wants it. One look at the outside tells you why - it's not a house, it's a box without a single redeeming feature. The team will really have to think outside the box to fix this one.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Taking that first step on the property ladder can be tough. So tough that many young couples can't do it without a leg up from mum and dad. Amanda Baxter was lucky enough to have stepdad Wayne when she and her partner wanted to buy a home for themselves and the kids. In fact, they were so lucky Wayne stumped up 50 percent of the mortgage payments. But when Amanda and her partner split, they could no longer afford the repayments. Wayne now wants to retire, so the whole family needs their money out. The house is in the respectable Perth suburb of Hamersley. But animal lover Amanda treats it more like a city farm. The dogs have dug up the yard, the chickens roost in the house, and the cats roam as they please. Amanda and her children are perfectly happy living in pets' paradise; buyers, on the other hand, find the whole thing a bit on the nose.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Sisters Maria and Sonia reluctantly put their family's Edwardian bungalow in Fitzroy North on the market, hoping to leave a legacy for their children.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Chris had just finished building his dream home in Callignee, Victoria, when it was burnt to the ground in the Black Saturday bushfires. Will Chris be able to rebuild his new fire-resistant home and his life as well?

programme.title: Wild Homes with George Clarke
programme.desc: George Clarke travels to remote Lord Howe Island. He explores a multigenerational renovation, a coastal retreat and dives into an ocean paradise with friendly turtles.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in High Wycombe where Carly and Phil are at deadlock over their four-bed semi. Eight years after buying their once roomy home, life is somewhat different with three young daughters.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil revisit Wendy and Simon in Derbyshire with two kids and three studios. They catch up with Steph and Tana in Edinburgh with baby Marcus.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: The first time Brendan Moran saw his north Bondi block, it was so steep and inaccessible he didn't bother getting out of the car. But wife Penny was undeterred. She saw the potential in the awkward L-shaped, battle-axe block. Despite being hemmed in on all sides by surrounding houses and with just one skinny laneway in, they reckoned they could squeeze all they needed for them and their four kids on this block by simply going up. Four levels should do it, rising 14m in the air with an infinity edge pool, and they're pushing building regulations to get it all in. But excavating this ex-quarry is more complicated than they think. In fact, every stage of the build is hampered by the challenges of the block. It's so tight there's nowhere for the tradies to put anything, and keeping peace with the neighbours is a full-time job. With builder and mentor Martin at the helm, Penny dons the work boots and hard hat, and gets on the tools. Her passion is building and she's all over the intricacies of the build as she juggles her life as a tradie with being a mum. After a family holiday to Thailand, she and Brendan return refreshed and inspired to make substantial structural changes they say will make their house even better. From changing the entire entrance to lifting ceiling heights and redesigning the pool to make it even longer and deeper, the complexity of this construction would challenge even the most seasoned builders. After numerous council applications and changes that blow their bank balance, and schedule, right out of the water, their spontaneous decision-making threatens to spiral out of control. As costs soar into the millions, there's no guarantee how or when this multi-tiered tower will ever get done.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Six years ago, high school sweethearts Mick and Brooke made the move from their hometown in country Queensland to the Sunshine Coast for a sea change. They purchased the house quickly, without knowing the area and soon realised it was not going to give them the buzzing, beachside lifestyle they were looking for. But its not just the location, the layout of the house is dysfunctional and outdated with a lot of unused space and untapped potential. Mick loves the size of their block, the oversized car port and the privacy, but as he is a FIFO worker, Brooke is home alone half the year and is often left feeling lonely and isolated. Will Neale be able to make Brooke fall in love with their home enough so that the location won't matter? Or will Andrew's search of the best beach side suburbs show Mick the light?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: House hunters search for their perfect property in the British countryside, exploring stunning homes and idyllic rural locations.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team roll out their 40th-anniversary tour, as they scour the country in search of hidden treasures. Yorkshire is their first stop.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams of amateur collectors have an hour at an antiques fair to acquire the best bargains.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Homes and gardens come alive in this lifestyle show packed full of ideas and information.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: The first time Brendan Moran saw his north Bondi block, it was so steep and inaccessible he didn't bother getting out of the car. But wife Penny was undeterred. She saw the potential in the awkward L-shaped, battle-axe block. Despite being hemmed in on all sides by surrounding houses and with just one skinny laneway in, they reckoned they could squeeze all they needed for them and their four kids on this block by simply going up. Four levels should do it, rising 14m in the air with an infinity edge pool, and they're pushing building regulations to get it all in. But excavating this ex-quarry is more complicated than they think. In fact, every stage of the build is hampered by the challenges of the block. It's so tight there's nowhere for the tradies to put anything, and keeping peace with the neighbours is a full-time job. With builder and mentor Martin at the helm, Penny dons the work boots and hard hat, and gets on the tools. Her passion is building and she's all over the intricacies of the build as she juggles her life as a tradie with being a mum. After a family holiday to Thailand, she and Brendan return refreshed and inspired to make substantial structural changes they say will make their house even better. From changing the entire entrance to lifting ceiling heights and redesigning the pool to make it even longer and deeper, the complexity of this construction would challenge even the most seasoned builders. After numerous council applications and changes that blow their bank balance, and schedule, right out of the water, their spontaneous decision-making threatens to spiral out of control. As costs soar into the millions, there's no guarantee how or when this multi-tiered tower will ever get done.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Phil helps childhood sweethearts Cleo and Ben find their first home together in Brixton. Kirstie meets first time buyer Charli, who's looking to get her first foot on the London property ladder in and around Croydon.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Six years ago, high school sweethearts Mick and Brooke made the move from their hometown in country Queensland to the Sunshine Coast for a sea change. They purchased the house quickly, without knowing the area and soon realised it was not going to give them the buzzing, beachside lifestyle they were looking for. But its not just the location, the layout of the house is dysfunctional and outdated with a lot of unused space and untapped potential. Mick loves the size of their block, the oversized car port and the privacy, but as he is a FIFO worker, Brooke is home alone half the year and is often left feeling lonely and isolated. Will Neale be able to make Brooke fall in love with their home enough so that the location won't matter? Or will Andrew's search of the best beach side suburbs show Mick the light?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Building a grand design takes time and more often than not, takes longer than anyone expects. Phil and Ariana have given themselves just two weeks to build their home in Maianbar, in Sydney's south, regardless of the fact they've never built anything before. Utilising a build system that has never been used for domestic housing in Australia before, this could either be a new blueprint for construction in this country, or a complete disaster. They've chosen a building method popular in European residential construction - cross-laminated timber which is essentially a flat pack home using wood compressed to be as strong as steel. With the design focused entirely on making the water views the centrepiece of the build, the house is put together piece by piece like a giant Meccano set. But with 130-plus timber panels precision-cut in an Austrian factory and installed in a strict order on site, there is no room for error. With Phil drawing on his skills in HR to project manage, will his unrelenting obsession with a strict time frame compromise the integrity of the design?

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie meets newlyweds Graeme and Anna, who have relocated from Oxfordshire to Yorkshire, while Phil Spencer helps local couple Sammi and Tom find their perfect property just north of Leeds.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey and Joel say they bought the worst house in the best street in Adelaide. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: The Parenting
programme.desc: Boyfriends Rohan and Josh plan a perfect weekend getaway in the country to introduce their parents. But as tensions begin to flare between the more traditional Sharon and Frank, and the laid-back Liddy and Cliff, the families soon realise that their rental, managed by eccentric local Brenda, is haunted by the presence of a 400-year-old poltergeist. When one parent becomes thoroughly possessed, it's up to the young couple and their meddlesome BFF Sara to unite the families and stop the evil entity once and for all.

programme.desc: Stranded in a remote town with no escape, Maya faces another terrifying night as three ruthless killers return to hunt. To survive, she must end their murderous spree.

programme.desc: Former heroes face threats. The Comedian is dead, Dr. Manhattan exiled to Mars, Ozymandias survived an attack and Rorschach is arrested.

programme.desc: Remi and Barnes, two very different teenagers, meet by chance in the winter of their senior year, then spend four days together over the course of a year that will change their lives forever.

programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Marvin, a Milwaukee real estate agent, gets a crimson envelope from a former partner-in-crime. Thrust into a world of hitmen and betrayal, he must face his dark past and a vengeful crime lord brother.

programme.title: Kerouac's Road: The Beat of a Nation
programme.desc: A modern exploration of On the Road, as celebrities and travellers reflect on real experiences in a digital world, mirroring Kerouac's search for genuine connection.

programme.desc: Friends find themselves on a dangerous path as they try to cover up the death of an innocent man.

programme.desc: About to embark on a world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and the pressures of fame, Skye is forced to face her past.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Anora

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother's first date in years turns terrifying when she receives anonymous threats during dinner, making her question if her charming date is behind the harassment.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: In 1947, a visionary architect and his wife flee post-war Europe to rebuild their legacy in the United States, but their lives are transformed by a mysterious, wealthy client.

programme.title: Honey Don't!
programme.desc: Small-town private investigator Honey O'Donahue probes a series of strange deaths that are tied to a mysterious church.

programme.title: Love & Rage: Munroe Bergdorf
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Munroe Bergdorf - author, model, and leading transgender activist.

programme.desc: Explores the real - life horror that occurred in the idyllic town of Moscow, Idaho, where criminology student Bryan Kohberger faced four first-degree murder charges and the death penalty for the murder of four University students.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers, whose mastermind is aided by the love Dom thought was dead, Letty. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks for the help of Dom and his elite team.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: Targeted by a cold-blooded black ops assassin with a score to settle, their only hope is to get behind the wheel again and secure an ingenious prototype tracking device. Facing their greatest threat yet in places as far away as Abu Dhabi and as familiar as the Los Angeles streets they call home, the crew must come together once again as a team, and as a family, to protect their own.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Now that Dom and Letty are married, Brian and Mia have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew have been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, our elite force will criss-cross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and bring home the man who made them a family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: This film follows devoted lifeguard Mitch Buchannon as he butts heads with a brash new recruit. Together, they uncover a local criminal plot that threatens the future of the bay. For a generation of TV fans the world over, the name Baywatch conjures up images of sun, surf and statuesque lifeguards, running in slow-motion in form-fitting red swimsuits.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Beck is a bounty hunter sent into the treacherous jungles of the Amazon to bring the rebellious Travis back to the States. When Beck and Travis reluctantly join forces to hunt down a priceless treasure, this unlikely team embarks on a pulse-pounding, nonstop thrill ride.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Misfit NYPD detectives, Gamble and Hoitz, are sentenced to life behind the desk. They hate each other and the monotony of their meaningless jobs, as they're forced to live in the shadow of the two biggest and most badass cops on the force. But when those guys go down for the count, opportunity knocks for Gamble and Hoitz. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

For a generation of TV fans the world over, the name Baywatch conjures up images of sun, surf and statuesque lifeguards, running in slow-motion in form-fitting red swimsuits.

programme.desc: In this sequel, the GI Joes are not only fighting their mortal enemy Cobra, they are forced to contend with threats from within the government that jeopardise their very existence.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: A mild-mannered accountant whose glory days are behind him, bumps into a formerly nerdy classmate and is pulled into the high-stakes world of international espionage.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected in the British Museum, the mummy walks the Earth once more, determined to fulfil his quest for immortality. An even more powerful force born of the darkest rituals of ancient Egypt has also been set loose in the world. When these two forces clash, the fate of the world will hang in the balance, sending the O'Connells on a desperate race to save the world.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as Driver who, after spending 10 years in prison, is intent on avenging the murder of his brother during the botched bank robbery that led to his imprisonment. He has a list of names to eliminate, but a veteran cop on the eve of retirement (Billy Bob Thornton) and a professional assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen) who is passionate about his job are both on his tail. As Driver seeks out the people on his list, the details about the circumstances in which his brother was killed becomes muddled and it seems that his list may be incomplete.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story. A group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Dom Toretto and Brian O'Conner lead a reunion of returning all-stars from every chapter of the explosive franchise built on speed to assemble for a high-stakes race that places an unlikely alliance of cops and racers in from Rio de Janeiro. The team must also defeat a corrupt businessman who wants them all dead. A dogged federal agent whose strike team tears through South America in hot pursuit, but soon has a difficult time determining the good men from the bad.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In this prequel to the blockbuster Mummy films, a mercenary is hired by a dissident alliance to kill the beautiful sorceress Cassandra, from whom the brutal tyrant Memnon draws his strength. Once Cassandra is removed the alliance plans to face Memnon's armies on their own terms, but the sorceress is not all she seems in this swirling, CGI-laden romp.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Now that Dom and Letty are married, Brian and Mia have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew have been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, our elite force will criss-cross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and bring home the man who made them a family.

programme.title: Skyscraper

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Misfit NYPD detectives, Gamble and Hoitz, are sentenced to life behind the desk. But when those guys go down for the count, opportunity knocks for Gamble and Hoitz. Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can the other guys step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers, whose mastermind is aided by the love Dom thought was dead, Letty. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level, so Hobbs asks for the help of Dom and his elite team.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as Driver who, after spending 10 years in prison, is intent on avenging the murder of his brother during the botched bank robbery that led to his imprisonment. He has a list of names to eliminate, but a veteran cop on the eve of retirement (Billy Bob Thornton) and a professional assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen) who is passionate about his job are both on his tail. As Driver seeks out the people on his list, the details about the circumstances in which his brother was killed becomes muddled and it seems that his list may be incomplete.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: Based on the character created by bestselling author Tom Clancy, Jack Ryan is a global action thriller set in the present day. This original story follows a young Jack as he uncovers a financial terrorist plot. The story follows him from 9/11, through his tour of duty in Afghanistan, which scarred him forever, and into his early days in the Financial Intelligence Unit of the modern CIA where he becomes an analyst, under the guardianship of his handler, Harper. When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to becoming a spy and must fight to save his own life and those of countless others, while also trying to protect the thing that's more important to him than anything, his relationship with his fiancee Cathy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: There's a traitor in the heart of America's most secret spy network, the Impossible Mission Force. He or she is trying to steal IMF's critical agent list which would give America's enemies the names of every covert operative in the world. When a mission goes badly wrong, agent Ethan Hunt (Cruise) is suspected of being the turncoat and becomes a hunted man. With all the might of IMF now turned against him, Hunt must flush out the real traitor - even if that means stealing the secret list himself.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley Valentine, a wisecracking, completely unpredictable English housewife who proves it's never too late to recapture your dreams. Bored with her suburban life, Shirley takes a chance on adventure when her friend invites her on a vacation to Greece. Within no time she's back to her rebellious teenage roots, saying yes to a wild fling with a handsome rogue and the life she's always wanted.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: Gray Wheeler just lost everything. But it could be the best thing that ever happened to her. After the death of her fiance, Gray moves in with her late love's best friends. While Sam and Dennis do their best to cheer Gray up, Fritz doesn't seem to care. Once Gray breaks through Fritz's defences, however, she finally sees why her fiance thought so highly of him. As they spend more time together, Gray learns that her chances for love have not died out with her fiance. But when some surprise guests show up on their doorstep, it'll take the love of all of her new friends to help Gray learn that life may be messy, but love is messier.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Anastasia and Christian have settled into a life together, but lingering demons from Christian's past threaten to disrupt their happily ever after.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: When a wounded Christian Grey tried to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Downton Abbey

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Boomerang
programme.desc: A successful executive and womaniser finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Anastasia and Christian have settled into a life together, but lingering demons from Christian's past threaten to disrupt their happily ever after.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy family's chauffeur falls in love with one of their sons.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly, but part when she decides that fate must determine their future. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that - despite the time, distance and obstacles that conspire to keep them apart - they will one day meet again.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Sundays at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Jane, a soon-to-be-married woman, is reunited with her imaginary friend, Michael, who returns in human form. Soon, Jane begins doubting her feelings for her fiance as she becomes attracted to Michael.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy family's chauffeur falls in love with one of their sons.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: After George is downsized from his financial firm and Linda's depressing documentary is cancelled, they can no longer afford their overpriced 'micro-loft' in New York. They find themselves with just one option - to pack up their lives and head south to move in with George's brother and his wife. George and Linda stumble upon Elysium, an idyllic community where the only rule is to be yourself.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan and Sara meet unexpectedly, but part when she decides that fate must determine their future. Years later, they are both engaged to others, but cannot give up the dream that - despite the time, distance and obstacles that conspire to keep them apart - they will one day meet again.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Sundays at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Jane, a soon-to-be-married woman, is reunited with her imaginary friend, Michael, who returns in human form. Soon, Jane begins doubting her feelings for her fiance as she becomes attracted to Michael.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Pro tennis "hot shot" Lizzie Bradbury is a rising star who lives to win. But when she falls for long-shot contender Peter Colt amid the glitz and glamour of Wimbledon, Lizzie discovers it's not if you win or lose, but how you play the game of love. A deliciously witty romantic comedy about chasing your dreams and risking your heart, this filmis a fun and charming story of love across the net.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick are frustrated with their luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Iris moves into Amanda's L.A. house in sunny California as Amanda arrives in the snow covered English countryside. Shortly after arriving at their destinations, both women find the last thing either wants or expects: a new romance. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Since Elizabeth, who is a down-to-earth high school teacher, and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are so different, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: After 15 years of marriage, Ben is still the free-spirited person he's always been while Katie is left to handle life's messy little problems. So when the kids go off to summer camp, they face the most important decision of their married life. Do they end their story or begin a new chapter? From start to finish, this film gives us reason to laugh and cry in an entertaining outlook on marriage.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Mack is tired of doing all the things she has to do to keep up with her friends and become successful in her 30s. Her deepest wish is to be an older woman so she can just chill out and wear a good chunky sweater. But when she's struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod at Coachella and becomes Rita, a 65-year-old woman, Mack learns that the reality of being an older age isn't quite what she imagined.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Pro tennis "hot shot" Lizzie Bradbury is a rising star who lives to win. But when she falls for long-shot contender Peter Colt amid the glitz and glamour of Wimbledon, Lizzie discovers it's not if you win or lose, but how you play the game of love. A deliciously witty romantic comedy about chasing your dreams and risking your heart, this filmis a fun and charming story of love across the net.

programme.title: The Story of Us

So when the kids go off to summer camp, they face the most important decision of their married life. Do they end their story or begin a new chapter? From start to finish, this film gives us reason to laugh and cry in an entertaining outlook on marriage.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: Gray Wheeler just lost everything. But it could be the best thing that ever happened to her. After the death of her fiance, Gray moves in with her late love's best friends. While Sam and Dennis do their best to cheer Gray up, Fritz doesn't seem to care. Once Gray breaks through Fritz's defences, however, she finally sees why her fiance thought so highly of him. As they spend more time together, Gray learns that her chances for love have not died out with her fiance. But when some surprise guests show up on their doorstep, it'll take the love of all of her new friends to help Gray learn that life may be messy, but love is messier.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect: an obnoxious elderly tenant who won't move out and refuses to die! Pushed to the edge of insanity as their dream home turns into a nightmare, it's only a matter of time before Alex and Nancy begin to entertain some truly sinister solutions to their problem.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way. From the director of Fast Times at Ridgemont High comes a 'teenagers save the world' comedy based loosely on Jane Austin's Emma, that elevated Alicia Silverstone from that Aerosmith girl to a star in the making.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: It Could Happen to You
programme.desc: In this heart-warming comedy, Charlie Lang buys a lottery ticket, leaving him short of cash to tip Yvonne, the waitress in his favourite lunch spot. Charlie offers her half the winnings and when the ticket pays $4 million, he incurs the wrath of his wife, Muriel, by honouring his promise. Muriel screams and goes manic when the winning number is read on the TV, and she screams twice as loud when Charlie finally tells her what he has done. As Charlie and Muriel grow apart, Charlie and Yvonne grow together.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: Very Valentine
programme.desc: A woman tries to save her family's wedding shoe business that is teetering on the brink of financial collapse.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: It Could Happen to You
programme.desc: In this heart-warming comedy, Charlie Lang buys a lottery ticket, leaving him short of cash to tip Yvonne, the waitress in his favourite lunch spot. Charlie offers her half the winnings and when the ticket pays $4 million, he incurs the wrath of his wife, Muriel, by honouring his promise. Muriel screams and goes manic when the winning number is read on the TV, and she screams twice as loud when Charlie finally tells her what he has done. As Charlie and Muriel grow apart, Charlie and Yvonne grow together.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A small-town police chief investigates the life of an unhappy teen after her corpse is found floating in a lake.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: This is the story of Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the "Marsh Girl" haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal 'The Cannibal' Lecter comes out of hiding to draw FBI agent Clarice Starling into a new high-stakes battle that will test her strength, cunning, and loyalty.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A murderer is loose on the streets of Manhattan. A diabolical killer whose brutal slayings leave a trail of cryptic messages hidden at the scene of the crime. Clues which only a brilliant mind can interpret. Lincoln Rhyme is a gifted but disabled detective who is assigned to the case as the city becomes gripped with fear. Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When D.C. Reporter Cal McCaffrey is assigned to investigate the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures. In a town of spin-doctors and wealthy power brokers, he will discover one truth: when fortunes are at stake, no one's integrity, love or life is safe.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Having lost his memory and the one person he loved, Bourne is forced to hunt down his past in order to find a future. Travelling from Moscow, Paris and London to Tangier and New York City, he continues his quest to find the real Jason Bourne, all the while trying to out-manoeuvre the scores of cops, federal officers and Interpol agents who have him in their sights.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Hannibal

Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and Manhattan Assistant District Attorney are determined to bring to justice one of the world's most powerful banks. Uncovering myriad and reprehensible illegal activities, Salinger and Whitman follow the money from Berlin to Milan to New York to Istanbul. Finding themselves in a high-stakes chase across the globe, their relentless tenacity puts their own lives at risk as their targets will stop at nothing, not even murder, to continue financing terror and war.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor aids a detective in investigating a rapidly growing string of murders at Atlanta Memorial Hospital.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The incredible true story of the enigmatic and opportunistic businessman Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust. This emotional film chronicles the trials and triumphs of one man who made a difference, and the tribulations of those who survived one of the darkest chapters in human history because of his actions.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: John Dillinger, a charismatic and elusive bank robber, is marked by the FBI as America's first 'Public Enemy No.1' and Billie Frechette is the only woman capable of capturing his heart. Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and Manhattan Assistant District Attorney are determined to bring to justice one of the world's most powerful banks. Uncovering myriad and reprehensible illegal activities, Salinger and Whitman follow the money from Berlin to Milan to New York to Istanbul. Finding themselves in a high-stakes chase across the globe, their relentless tenacity puts their own lives at risk as their targets will stop at nothing, not even murder, to continue financing terror and war.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. With a weak team with a history of losses coupled with little budget, Billy hires Yale-educated economist Peter Brand who set about to find discards of the game who have key skills but are undervalued because they are injured or too old. The coach Art Howe refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder

Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: After surviving a motorcycle accident, a former boxer and long-time agnostic starts to wonder if he can use his second chance to help others, and his journey from self-destruction to redemption inspired countless people along the way.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich, a struggling single mum who exposes a powerful utility company for dumping deadly toxic waste which is slowly poisoning the local residents. Employed as a filing clerk in her lawyer's firm, the former beauty queen stumbles across this landmark case that transforms her into a working class hero.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: After surviving a motorcycle accident, a former boxer and long-time agnostic starts to wonder if he can use his second chance to help others, and his journey from self-destruction to redemption inspired countless people along the way.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Death On Duty
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor helps a detective investigate the murder of a former Marine.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island. As Chuck struggles to survive, he finds that his own personal journey has only just begun.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Seemingly flawless medical student Philip Markoff leads a double life and starts to descend into a twisted world of gambling, crime, battery and eventually murder, all while meeting his victims through Craigslist.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Andrew Neyman is an ambitious young jazz drummer, single-minded in his pursuit to rise to the top of his elite east coast music conservatory. Plagued by the failed writing career of his father, Andrew hungers day and night to become one of the greats. Terence Fletcher, an instructor equally known for his teaching talents as for his terrifying methods, leads the top jazz ensemble in the school. Fletcher discovers Andrew and transfers the aspiring drummer into his band, forever changing the young man's life. Andrew's passion to achieve perfection quickly spirals into obsession, as his ruthless teacher continues to push him to the brink of both his ability and his sanity.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

programme.title: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Gerry Conlon is one of four men coerced into signing false confessions for the IRA bombing of the Guildford pub that killed five people. His father is also unjustly charged and imprisoned with his son. Gerry spends 14 years in prison trying to prove his innocence and clear his family's name with the help of a British lawyer. Adapted from Conlon's autobiography Proved Innocent.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy

But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It's vast, untamed and home to some of the toughest places to reach. For the truckers who travel this harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B: the hard way.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For the past several decades, two months out of every year, a truly historic event occurs. Truckers in the world's most dangerous tundras carry vital equipment to remote outposts located hundreds of miles north of civilisation and all the roads are temporarily created by frozen bodies of water. The mission is to transport thousands of loads before the road literally disappears into the sea. Like their trailblazing forefathers, these truckers continue to carry on the lone wolf entrepreneurial spirit that built America, taking huge risks in the hopes of receiving huge rewards. Continuing this groundbreaking series, our truckers will once again embark on a race against the elements, against time and against each other. The series will continue to examine this time honoured profession that dates back almost a century, often through generations of families.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As the season hits full stride, alligators begin changing their behaviours and the hunters must adjust to stay one step ahead; Joey and Zak swap their trademark weapons to see who can nab the biggest bulls.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It's vast, untamed and home to some of the toughest places to reach. For the truckers who travel this harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B: the hard way.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, the team finds a Bob Ross painting and a jersey signed by the Purple People Eaters.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: I Learned It From Watching You!
programme.desc: The team are back for another season of heated auction battles and great finds. Dan and Laura Dotson take over for the second half of the season in their usual hyper-energetic style that viewers have gotten accustomed to since the inception of the show. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start, Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager, if unprepared, pupil, while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. Rene Nezhoda hits the ground running, nailing a huge vintage video game locker and showing that he's still a major player. Ivy Calhoun keeps grinding, buying locker after locker, working economies of scale to his advantage. Mary Padian is as feisty as ever, holding her own against the competition. Rounding out the bidders is long-time fan favourite Kenny Crossley. This time, Kenny brings his unique hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right, catching the others off guard and putting on a show for the audience. Simply put, Kenny is magic. After-hours in Huntington Beach brings out the family. We find out Rene's daughter has a great eye, the Schulz/Passantes add to their outdoor options, and The Gambler meets the predators.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: You Win Some, You Luge Some
programme.desc: The team are back for another season of heated auction battles and great finds. This time, Kenny brings his unique, hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right, catching the others off guard and putting on a show for the audience. Simply put, Kenny is magic. In this episode, Indio is extreme-ly interesting for Dave, Brandi and Jarrod find the ultimate stash, while Mary's locker misfires.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The Taskmaster, Greg Davies, makes more carefully considered judgements as the five competitors wrestle with snow globes, rubber ducks and wooden spoons.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As the season hits full stride, alligators begin changing their behaviours and the hunters must adjust to stay one step ahead; Joey and Zak swap their trademark weapons to see who can nab the biggest bulls.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Rick and Marty Lagina race to unearth secrets in both the triangle-shaped Swamp and the Money Pit as a major hurricane approaches Oak Island.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's dream comes true when he gets to spend the day with his hero, Jimmy Brogan, a former crime reporter. But the dream becomes a nightmare when Jake's comments about Holt and the precinct are considered "on the record". Meanwhile, Terry and Charles try to teach Rosa how to be less terrifying on the witness stand.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: In rough water, salvors scramble to retrieve a cruise ship's anchor lost at sea, but they have to find it first!

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Armando adopts a new persona, Kumail grapples with skittles in oven gloves, Joanna attempts a skill she last tried aged 12 & Joel twirls a pretty umbrella.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: The locals of Louisiana who live in the swamps of the Atchafalaya River Basin face certain challenges as they hunt American alligators for their livelihood.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on Earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant 18-wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub-zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: This vast island continent is home to some of the hardest places to reach on Earth. But for the mega trucks that keep the country moving, getting there is just another day at the office. Longer than a jet liner and heavier than a tank, they can run 24/7, pulling anything from houses to hamburgers. Behind the wheel are some of the best and toughest drivers in the world, their motto: anything, anytime, anywhere. Turbo's rig begins to overheat midway through a vital run. Meanwhile, Mark Cromwell fights to complete the biggest job of his career to date.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: This vast island continent is home to some of the hardest places to reach on Earth. But for the mega trucks that keep the country moving, getting there is just another day at the office. Longer than a jet liner and heavier than a tank, they can run 24/7, pulling anything from houses to hamburgers. Behind the wheel are some of the best and toughest drivers in the world, their motto: anything, anytime, anywhere. Russell battles waterlogged tracks in the desert as he tries to deliver his load on time, and Yogi's reputation hangs in the balance following the biggest week of his career.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. Watch as an expert team navigates through extremely rocky, mountainous terrain, delivering precious cargo to thrilled home owners.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: In a time when creditors have closed their purse strings and stopped lending, the residents of Detroit know they can always rely on American Jewelry and Loan, 'The Working Man's Bank'. Follow the Gold family as they wheel and deal with colourful customers, manage temperamental employees, and squabble with each other, all in the name of making a buck in one of the most troubled cities in America.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn

Follow the Gold family as they wheel and deal with colourful customers, manage temperamental employees, and squabble with each other, all in the name of making a buck in one of the most troubled cities in America.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Meet Les Gold, owner of the enormous American Jewelry and Loan pawnshop in Detroit. If every pawn ticket has a story to tell then Les has over 45,000 stories in his warehouse. Working for him, and sometimes clashing with him, are his son, Seth, his daughter, Ashley, and his trusted manager, Rich. They are all experts at dealing with the unexpected and the bizarre as customers bring in everything from alligators to prosthetic limbs. The items often hold deep personal significance, so haggling over a price can quickly escalate into an all-out conflict.

programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on Earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant 18-wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub-zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the team makes contact with the elusive tunnel under the Garden Shaft, an exciting new scientific theory surfaces which suggests a connection between Nolan's Cross and the Knights Templar.

programme.title: Smartless: On the Road
programme.desc: A very special show with Matt Damon and a visit from Sean's sister (and fan-favourite), Tracy.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Crews work around the clock to build the world's largest underwater concrete bed to salvage the Costa Concordia. And, a fire at America's largest shipwreck causes devastation.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: This vast island continent is home to some of the hardest places to reach on Earth. But for the mega trucks that keep the country moving, getting there is just another day at the office. Longer than a jet liner and heavier than a tank, they can run 24/7, pulling anything from houses to hamburgers. Behind the wheel are some of the best and toughest drivers in the world, their motto: anything, anytime, anywhere. Russell Mcdonough has his work cut out when a track collapses under the weight of his rig, while troubles lie ahead for Yogi.

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Meet Les Gold, owner of the enormous American Jewelry and Loan pawnshop in Detroit. If every pawn ticket has a story to tell then Les has over 45,000 stories in his warehouse. Working for him, and sometimes clashing with him, are his son, Seth, his daughter, Ashley, and his trusted manager, Rich. They are all experts at dealing with the unexpected and the bizarre as customers bring in everything from alligators to prosthetic limbs. The items often hold deep personal significance, so haggling over a price can quickly escalate into an all-out conflict.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Chris Ward gets a call out to salvage a motor yacht that's sitting in 50ft of water. Its been out there for a week - but he needs to raise it and return the $20,000 boat back to its owner. With Josh Moreira he sets out locate it and retrieve the vessel. John Ward has a tough job on his hands. A 44-foot motor launch is hung up on a dam on a fast flowing section of the Mississippi River in St Louis. He's the only salvor 'crazy enough' to attempt it. It's a life threatening salvage, and it takes everything they've got to attempt to recover the vessel. In the British Isles veteran salvor Glen Skelton is called in to repair and refit a major storm gate in Jersey before winter sets in and threatens millions of pounds of yachts moored in the harbour.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.sub-title: May The Norse Be With You
programme.desc: The Brotherhood uncovers a new structure under the swamp and a new theory suggests the Vikings worked with the Templars to help them get to Oak Island.

programme.title: Smartless: On the Road
programme.desc: The guys finish out their tour in Los Angeles with special guests Kevin Hart and Jimmy Kimmel.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Chris Ward gets a call out to salvage a motor yacht that's sitting in 50ft of water. programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As gators hide deeper in the swamp, the hunters launch into full pursuit; Ronnie and Timmy chase a legendary gator that's been on the run for years.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob and Steelo welcome Lolo Wood to chug some water in Stayin' Hydrated, experience small-town terror in Living in Horrorville and discover the importance of having good aim.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and special guest Lolo Wood break out the instruction manuals for Using Things Wrong, and shine a light on some Shadow Fun.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: More rigorous tests are set by Greg Davies, and his secretary Alex Horne, for five wary competitors. This time, it's a wet bra, a skinny elephant and a banana pancake.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The team are back for another season of heated auction battles and great finds. Dan and Laura Dotson take over for the second half of the season in their usual hyper-energetic style that viewers have gotten accustomed to since the inception of the show. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start, Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager, if unprepared, pupil, while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. Rene Nezhoda hits the ground running, nailing a huge vintage video game locker and showing that he's still a major player. Ivy Calhoun keeps grinding, buying locker after locker, working economies of scale to his advantage. Mary Padian is as feisty as ever, holding her own against the competition. Rounding out the bidders is long-time fan favourite Kenny Crossley. This time, Kenny brings his unique, hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right, catching the others off guard and putting on a show for the audience. Simply put, Kenny is magic. In this episode, Mary bumps into some vintage art, and Ivy adds to his stamp collection. Then, Kenny faces his fears, yet again.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The team are back for another season of heated auction battles and great finds. Dan and Laura Dotson take over for the second half of the season in their usual hyper-energetic style that viewers have gotten accustomed to since the inception of the show. In this episode, The Gambler returns to form in Huntington Beach, as Rene gets on everyone's bad side. Then, Mary finds her likeness lucrative, while Ivy's prospects are cloudy at best.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: In Phoenix, Rick checks Americana, Chum spots mid-century furniture, and Corey digs into boxing memorabilia.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: The outback is one of the world's last wild frontiers. It's vast, untamed and home to some of the toughest places to reach. For the truckers who travel this harsh country, there's only one way to get from A to B: the hard way.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For the past several decades, two months out of every year, a truly historic event occurs. Truckers in the world's most dangerous tundras carry vital equipment to remote outposts located hundreds of miles north of civilisation and all the roads are temporarily created by frozen bodies of water. The mission is to transport thousands of loads before the road literally disappears into the sea. Like their trailblazing forefathers, these truckers continue to carry on the lone wolf entrepreneurial spirit that built America, taking huge risks in the hopes of receiving huge rewards. Continuing this groundbreaking series, our truckers will once again embark on a race against the elements, against time and against each other. The series will continue to examine this time honoured profession that dates back almost a century, often through generations of families.

programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.
